title: RTP
description: Adds an RTP feature letting you randomly teleport you in the world
body:
RTP

Allows players to teleport to a random location in the world!

### Warning This description is valid only for versions from `2.0.0` upwards. ## CONFIGURATION Config location: - **NeoForge:** `config/rtp/configuration.toml` - **Forge:** `world/serverconfig/rtp/configuration.toml` ## COMMANDS - /rtp - **[Teleport randomly in the world]**
## Why RTP This version of RTP pre-loads chunks before teleporting the player, meaning no lag visible for the player when they're teleported, otherwise they would be stuck in a void-like limbo for a few seconds or minutes. This version of RTP also rerolls the teleport location if it's unable to load the chunks, with a customizable amount of attempts to not break the game if there are no locations available.
